title: CS50 for Business - Lecture 7 - Deploying Databases
summary: CS50 for Business Lecture 7 covers the deployment and management of databases at scale using SQL and NoSQL databases. The lecture includes best practices for efficient data storage and querying. The course is available through edX, Harvard Extension School, and Harvard Summer School.
